name: permission_gate
description: an agent permission-gated edit world; actions propose, approve, apply, deny

card.description: an agent permission-gated edit world; actions propose, approve, apply, deny

rules: One edit is in flight at a time; the gate tracks it via 'status' (idle, proposed, approved, applied, denied).
'propose' opens a pending edit, carrying its content from the action params, only when no edit is in flight (idle/applied/denied -> proposed).
'approve' grants permission; only a proposed edit may be approved (proposed -> approved).

'apply' commits the pending edit into applied_content, but is gated: it is permitted only after approval (approved -> applied). Applying an un-approved edit is a no-op -- the agent cannot bypass the gate.
'deny' rejects and discards an in-flight edit, committing nothing (proposed/approved -> denied).
proposed/approved/applied/denied are monotonic counters of each event.
